channel.title: meristem on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in meristem on funPlantGenes

item.title: Cg1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM5G838324 Gene Symbol: Cg1 Gene Name: Corngrass1 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Furthermore, a target of Cg1 is teosinte glume architecture1 (tga1)1, a gene known to have had a role in the domestication of maize from teosinte.

item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb005840 Gene Symbol: Ct2 Gene Name: compact plant2 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmCLE7
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G372364 Gene Symbol: ZmCLE7 Gene Name: clavata3/esr-related7 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: CRISPR–Cas9 to edit maize CLE promoters and a newly characterized maize CLE gene identified through its compensatory upregulation in a ZmCLE7 mutant.

item.title: ZmSMU2
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmSMU2 Gene Name: Putative splicing factor Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The Maize ZmSMU2 Gene Encodes a Putative RNA-Splicing Factor That Affects Protein Synthesis and RNA Processing during Endosperm Development.
